item.title: Why is Madhav Infra Projects Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Apr, Madhav Infra Projects Ltd witnessed a notable uptick in its share price, rising by 3.03% to close at ₹9.52. This movement reflects a continuation of positive momentum supported by increased investor participation and outperformance relative to both its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Mega Flex Plastics Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Apr, Mega Flex Plastics Ltd experienced a notable decline in its share price, falling by 4.7% to ₹145.00. This drop contrasts with the stock’s impressive long-term performance, highlighting a period of short-term correction amid broader market dynamics. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is AB Cotspin India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Apr, AB Cotspin India Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling nearly 20% to hit a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹311.15. This steep drop reflects a continuation of recent negative momentum, with the stock underperforming both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Apr, Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd experienced a significant decline in its share price, falling by 7.54% to close at ₹197.35. This drop follows a notable period of gains, marking a clear reversal in the stock’s recent upward momentum. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is MEP Infrastructure Developers Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Apr, MEP Infrastructure Developers Ltd recorded a modest price increase of 1.04%, closing at ₹0.97, continuing a recent streak of gains despite a challenging longer-term performance backdrop. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Shree Manufacturing Company Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 24-Apr, Shree Manufacturing Company Ltd experienced a modest decline in its share price, closing at ₹18.99, down by 0.47% or ₹0.09. This movement reflects a complex interplay of recent trading patterns, investor participation, and broader market comparisons. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Dr Agarwals Eye Hospital Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Apr, Dr Agarwals Eye Hospital Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹5,023.05 with a gain of 3.02%, reflecting growing investor confidence driven by robust financial results and sustained market outperformance. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Tata Consultancy Services Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Apr, Tata Consultancy Services Ltd. (TCS) witnessed a significant decline in its share price, closing at ₹2,397.30, down ₹125.25 or 4.97%. This drop reflects a broader trend of underperformance relative to both its sector and benchmark indices, amid subdued investor participation and technical weaknesses. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Ambani Orgochem Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 24-Apr, Ambani Orgochem Ltd's stock price surged by 4.51% to close at ₹137.95, significantly outperforming both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Has Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd has declared a dividend of 5400% (₹130 per share) with an ex-date of May 7, 2026. The company has shown strong total returns across various periods, particularly over the long term. Time: Apr 24 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: When is the next results date for Urban Company Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Urban Company Ltd is 08 May 2026. Time: Apr 24 2026 11:16 PM IST
